message:
Fix module system: eliminate 554 relative imports

- Added 7 shared modules to build.zig (hashmap_helper, allocator_helper, runtime, collections, fnv_hash, zig_keywords, ast)
- Fixed 554 relative imports to use module system
- Fixed async subdirectory imports (task.zig, future.zig, etc)
- Fixed json subdirectory imports (errors.zig, value.zig)
- Fixed valueIterator API for Zig 0.15.2 (valueIterator → values)
- Added SIMD dispatch stubs (hasEscapes, findClosingQuote)
- Fixed ast.zig imports throughout src/
- Fixed c_interop mapper types (FunctionMapping, ArgMapping, Conversion, ReturnMapping)
- Created JSON spec compliance tests (escape sequences, scientific notation, unicode)

Build status: 51 errors → 0 errors ✅
